title: ReplaceText Reborn
description: This mod allows you to replace any text sent by you in the chat. You can automatically replace profanity with nice words or shortcuts with full words.
body:
---

### **TextReplace Reborn Mod - Command Guide**

The `/replace` command is used to manage word replacements in real-time.

**Basic Syntax:**
`/replace <subcommand> [arguments]`

**List of Subcommands:**

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **`/replace add <word>`** | Adds a new word to be replaced. You will be prompted to enter the replacement word in a separate message. |
| **`/replace remove <word>`** | Removes the specified word from the replacement list. |
| **`/replace list`** | Shows the list of all words that will be replaced. |
| **`/replace reload`** | Reloads the replacement list from the configuration file. Useful for applying manual changes made to the file. |
| **`/replace help`** | Shows a list of all available commands and their usage. |
| **`/replace credits`** | Displays information about the mod's developers and credits. |
